subject: Ben's Bites — Open-source agents are eating SaaS
bodyHtml:
Three new open-source agentic frameworks shipped this week, and the install-base is growing 30% week-over-week.

The pattern: companies replace per-seat SaaS with internal agents fine-tuned on their own data. Estimated TAM disruption: $40B by 2028 according to a16z's latest SaaS report.

Read more | unsubscribe
